name: kongmy-stack-skeleton
description: Template system clone-point: apps, packages, scripts, and deployment recipes.

scripts.type-check: tsc --noEmit -p packages/contract && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/db && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web
scripts.ci: bun run type-check && bun run boundary-check && bun run test
